steps.title: Identify the reinforcement
steps.content: The first two sentences explain that Tyrian purple was prized and that Phoenicians were famous for using it. The final sentence adds that the name “Phoenicia” may have meant “land of purple,” which strengthens the same point.

steps.title: Select a reinforcing transition
steps.content: Choice B signals independence or contrast. Choice C suggests a sequence, but the passage is not listing steps. Choice D signals opposition, which does not fit. “In fact” introduces stronger supporting information about purple’s importance to Phoenicia. The answer is A.
